message:
fix: parallelize CountServiceAccountsAllClusters and skip unnecessary RBAC fetches (#3824) (#3842)

The function previously iterated clusters sequentially, calling
ListServiceAccounts for each one. ListServiceAccounts internally calls
buildServiceAccountRolesMap which fetches all RoleBindings and
ClusterRoleBindings — data that was never used for counting.

This change:
- Lists ServiceAccounts directly via the Kubernetes client, skipping
  the expensive and unnecessary RoleBinding/ClusterRoleBinding fetches
- Fans out requests in parallel (one goroutine per cluster) using
  sync.WaitGroup, reducing wall-clock time from O(n) to O(1) in the
  number of clusters
- Reduces API calls per cluster from 3 to 1

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
